name: Library users (SLAM/SfM/robotics researchers)
role: Calibrate fisheye rigs; run VO; export to reconstruction tools
primary_concerns: Accuracy; correct wide-FOV geometry; ecosystem interop

name: Embedded / robotics engineers
primary_concerns: TI LDC export; real-time pose; portability

name: Computer-vision practitioners
role: Interop with Kalibr/COLMAP/nerfstudio; convert between models
primary_concerns: IO fidelity; model conversion without re-shooting

name: Learning practitioners
role: Learn wide-FOV geometry from runnable curriculum
primary_concerns: Clear docs; reproducible examples on small public data

name: Contributors (human and AI agents)
role: Add models/features under a controlled process
primary_concerns: Clear playbooks; traceability; CI gates; DoD

name: Maintainer / release owner
primary_concerns: No unverified release; no internal-process leakage; auditability
